title: schillera
intro: Schillera is a genus of flowering plants in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the orange or citrus family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. The Schillera plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, colds, and respiratory problems due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and essential oils are commonly used to harness the health benefits of the Schillera plant, including its ability to reduce stress and promote a healthy immune system.
